Home › Shop › Echeveria 'Lola'

Echeveria 'Lola'

Echeveria
$24.99
A stunning rosette succulent with pearlescent lavender-pink leaves. Echeveria 'Lola' thrives in bright indirect light and needs watering only when the soil is completely dry. Perfect for windowsills and arrangements.
Add to Cart
